User.title: User Profile
User.description: Custom registered tenant with structural roles and subscriptions inside the design matrix.

id.description: Unique primary key of the user node matching credentials or auth identifier.

name.description: Descriptive legal name of the design tenant.

email.description: Digital verified mailbox address of the tenant.

role.description: Access authorization level inside the studio workspace.

plan.description: Subscription tier enabling design token compiles.

registeredAt.description: ISO date string representing registration timestamp.

mrr.description: Monthly recurring revenue contribution in Swedish Krona (SEK).

Feedback.title: Feedback Submission
Feedback.description: User review or critique analyzing layout, spacing, typography, and AI compiler performance.

name.description: Name of the submitter or reviewer.

category.description: Thematic focus area of the critique.

timestamp.description: ISO or formatted timestamp of submission.

users/{userId}.description: Directory of verified developer and admin tenants guarding workspace access.

feedbacks/{feedbackId}.description: Immutable visual feedback and compilation telemetry records.

waitlist/{waitlistId}.description: Submissions for early access program prioritized by register delay.
